title: Validated Cluster
description: A governed, validated failure pattern cluster that has passed the AW0 Cluster Validation Layer. Only valid clusters are forwarded to the AW prompt improvement loop.

cluster_id.description: Unique identifier for the source ErrorCluster.

cluster_signature.description: Canonical signature string identifying the failure pattern (primary_error_code).

record_count.description: Number of classification records in the cluster.

error_codes.description: All error codes present in the cluster (primary and secondary).

pass_types.description: Distinct pass types represented in the cluster.

remediation_targets.description: Unique remediation targets derived from the cluster.

validation_reasons.description: Explicit reasons explaining why the cluster passed or failed each check.

stability_score.description: Normalized score (0–1) measuring consistency of the cluster signature across records.

cohesion_score.description: Normalized score (0–1) measuring how tightly the cluster is dominated by a single error code.

actionability_score.description: Normalized score (0–1) measuring how actionable the cluster is (inverse of number of remediation targets).

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this validated cluster record was created.
